wins.event: FY 2025 revenue $64B (+24% YoY); AI revenue $20B (+65% YoY); semi $37B record
Q4 revenue $18B record (+28% YoY); EBITDA $12.2B record (+34%)
AI backlog $73B (to deliver over 18 months); consolidated backlog $162B record
Anthropic additional $11B XPU order for late 2026 (on top of $10B from Q3); 5th XPU customer added with $1B order
Q1 2026 AI revenue guide $8.2B (double YoY); Q1 total guide $19.1B (+28% YoY)

risks.event: Non-AI Q1 guide $4.1B, down sequentially on wireless seasonality; flat YoY
Enterprise spending shows limited signs of recovery (server storage, enterprise networking weak)
Customer concentration in XPUs: 3 prod + 5th newly added — small set of mega-customers

guidance.notes: Q1 2026 guide $19.1B (+28% YoY); EBITDA 67%. AI to continue accelerating in 2026 and drive most of growth. Software ~+low-double-digits in FY 2026.

_notes: Year-end peak. $73B AI backlog disclosure plus Anthropic $11B follow-on order plus 5th XPU customer. CEO at maximum confidence. Backlog visibility dominates the narrative.
